name: Sales discovery call
description: A B2B discovery -> pricing -> objection -> closing call. The REP is the user; whispers coach the REP. Designed to fire every agent in the Sales suite and to show event coordination and cooldown gating.
user_context: You are Alex, an account executive at Acme Software. You are on a live call with a prospect. The copilot whispers private coaching to you.

steps.speaker: REP
steps.text: Thanks for making the time today. To start -- tell me how your team handles this process right now.
steps.note: Discovery opens. Phase Tracker sets phase=discovery. No whisper expected.

steps.speaker: CUSTOMER
steps.text: Sure. Right now everything lives in spreadsheets and honestly it's a mess. Things slip through the cracks.
steps.note: Pain surfaced. Still discovery; nothing should fire yet.

steps.speaker: CUSTOMER
steps.text: Before we go further -- how much does your platform actually cost?
steps.note: A customer QUESTION about pricing. Expect: phase -> negotiation; Question Detector emits an event; Answer Suggester fires in PHASE 2 (one-hop coordination).

steps.speaker: REP
steps.text: Great question. It depends on seats -- let me walk you through the tiers.

steps.speaker: CUSTOMER
steps.text: Hmm, honestly that sounds expensive compared to what we pay now.
steps.note: PRICE OBJECTION. Expect a WARNING whisper, an `objection` fact, and objection_count -> 1 in memory.

steps.speaker: CUSTOMER
steps.text: Could you do a discount if we sign for a year?
steps.note: Second objection only 7s later. Objection Handler is on a 10s cooldown -> it is GATED (see 'skipped: cooldown'). 'sign' is a buying signal, so Buying Signal Detector fires instead.

steps.speaker: CUSTOMER
steps.text: We've got about $40k budgeted for this per year, if it's the right fit.
steps.note: Budget figure. Budget Extractor writes a `budget` fact silently. No whisper.

steps.speaker: CUSTOMER
steps.text: Can you guarantee we'll be fully live within two weeks?
steps.note: QUESTION + 'guarantee'. Expect TWO things this turn: Compliance Monitor warns (priority 10), and Question Detector -> Answer Suggester fires again in Phase 2.

steps.speaker: REP
steps.text: I can promise you we'll be live in exactly two weeks, no risk at all.
steps.note: The REP over-promises. Compliance Monitor catches 'promise' / 'no risk' and warns the rep to soften the claim.

steps.speaker: CUSTOMER
steps.text: Okay -- I think we're ready to move forward. What are the next steps?
steps.note: Strong buying signal + a question. Expect: phase -> closing; Buying Signal OPPORTUNITY; and an Answer Suggester whisper in Phase 2.
16s of dead air. No SILENCE-triggered agent is configured, so nothing fires -- a deliberate lesson: trigger types only fire agents that subscribe to them.
